title: Discover The Arroyos in West Seattle | Neighborhood Real Estate Guide — Cloud City Homes
content: # Discovering The Arroyos: A Hidden Gem in West Seattle. West Seattle, the historic heart of Seattle, boasts a variety of neighborhoods, each with its own unique charm. Nestled along Puget Sound, this picturesque area is bordered by Arbor Heights to the north and Seola Park to the east. The Arroyos consists of two distinct neighborhoods, Arroyo Heights and Arroyo Beach, both offering breathtaking views and a peaceful atmosphere. ## Arroyo Heights: Scenic Vistas and Mid-Century Charm. Arroyo Heights is known for its stunning hilltop views and well-preserved mid-century modern homes. Beyond the architectural appeal, Arroyo Heights provides residents with sweeping views of Puget Sound, Mount Rainier, and the nearby islands. One of the defining features of The Arroyos is its connection to nature. ## A Hidden Treasure in West Seattle. Whether enjoying panoramic hilltop views in Arroyo Heights or embracing the laid-back coastal life at Arroyo Beach, residents here enjoy a peaceful retreat just minutes from the conveniences of the city.
